title: EPIC: Multi-provider AI integration for notebook assistance
body: Problem: Need pluggable support for cloud and local LLMs. Goal: Unified API for provider calls with robust errors and retries. Scope: interface, adapters, settings, integration tests. Acceptance: one cloud provider + Ollama, swappable provider architecture, standardized user-facing errors.

title: EPIC: Dataset import, cleaning, and analysis assistance
body: Problem: Users need guided analysis from raw data to insight. Goal: AI assists import, cleaning, and Julia code generation with safe apply flow. Scope: import assistant, cleaning widgets/modules, analysis suggestions. Acceptance: guided import, cleaning workflows, preview-before-apply code path.

title: EPIC: Sidebar quick actions and guided help modes
body: Problem: Frequent notebook actions are too manual. Goal: Add fast UI actions and per-interaction help controls. Scope: sidebar, keyboard shortcuts, help mode semantics and persistence. Acceptance: context-aware actions, visible help mode for each request, persistent settings.

title: EPIC: Trust, observability, reproducibility, and export
body: Problem: AI features require safety and reproducibility guarantees. Goal: Add redaction, provenance metadata, usage metrics, and export support. Scope: telemetry, policy checks, exports, docs. Acceptance: redaction applied, provenance saved, multi-format export working.

title: Define AI provider interface and response schema
body: Create typed provider interfaces for completion, streaming, and code generation. Add structured response schema with validation and standard error taxonomy. Include unit tests for valid and invalid payloads.

title: Implement Ollama adapter with model configuration
body: Implement local Ollama adapter with configurable host, model, timeout, and retry behavior. Map transport and model errors into the standardized error taxonomy. Add integration tests with mocked responses.

title: Implement cloud provider adapter with secure key handling
body: Implement first cloud adapter with secure API key handling, retry strategy, and rate limit handling. Ensure secrets are never logged. Add tests for auth and quota failure paths.

title: Build notebook context assembler for prompt generation
body: Assemble notebook-aware prompt context including user intent, recent outputs, and dataset profile summary. Enforce size limits and truncation/summarization rules for large context windows.

title: Add dataset profiling engine for schema and quality summary
body: Implement lightweight dataset profiling with columns, types, missingness, uniqueness, and basic stats. Provide serialized summary for prompt inputs and sidebar recommendations.

title: Create prompt templates for import, cleaning, and EDA
body: Create versioned prompt templates for import help, cleaning help, EDA suggestions, and visualization ideas. Add deterministic tests for template assembly and output sections.

title: Build AI assistant panel with streaming responses
body: Build UI panel for assistant interactions with streamed responses, loading/error states, and cancellation support. Ensure model and help mode are visible for each message cycle.

title: Add per-interaction help mode selector
body: Add modes for advice-only, explain-first, code-generation, and guided-step-by-step. Persist default mode while allowing per-request override in UI.

title: Implement code preview and apply confirmation flow
body: Implement diff/preview step for generated Julia code and require explicit user confirmation before insertion/execution. Store provenance metadata for each applied suggestion.

title: Build dataset import wizard for common formats
body: Create dataset import wizard supporting CSV, TSV, Parquet, Arrow, and JSON with options for delimiter, encoding, and schema inference. Generate robust Julia import code.

title: Implement cleaning module for missing values and type normalization
body: Implement reusable cleaning actions for null handling and type normalization with explicit assumptions. Include reversible operation metadata for undo support.

title: Implement cleaning widgets for duplicates, strings, and dates
body: Build UI widgets for duplicate handling, string normalization, and date parsing. Each widget should generate Julia transformation snippets and support chained usage.

title: Build sidebar quick actions and action registry
body: Build context-aware sidebar with common actions such as Load Data, Profile Data, Clean Data, Plot Suggestions, and Export. Add action registry for extensibility.

title: Add keyboard shortcuts for common workflow actions
body: Add keyboard shortcuts for high-frequency actions and surface shortcut hints in UI. Include conflict checks and accessibility considerations.

title: Add export pipeline for HTML, Markdown, CSV, and report bundle
body: Implement export actions for notebook outputs and derived artifacts in HTML, Markdown, and CSV plus a reproducible report bundle format.

title: Add telemetry with redaction and usage metrics
body: Add telemetry events for latency, token usage, error rates, and model/provider mix. Redact sensitive values prior to persistence or transmission.

title: Security pass for prompt injection and unsafe code suggestions
body: Add baseline checks to detect suspicious prompt instructions and potentially unsafe generated code patterns. Surface clear warnings and require explicit approval gates.

title: End-to-end tests for import-clean-analyze workflow
body: Create deterministic e2e coverage for the workflow: import dataset, profile, cleaning suggestions, code generation, preview, apply, and export.

title: Documentation and onboarding notebooks for AI features
body: Create user docs and onboarding notebooks for provider setup, data import, cleaning workflows, and safe AI usage. Add troubleshooting and known limitations.
